form.formComment: Resumes after three months. Finished off last preparation didn't finish the race at this track January 8 over 4000m. First up last campaign ran last at Hereford November 3 over 5100m, 39 len behind Doctor Kildare with 76kg at $126. What happened last time is not ideal so not likely to threaten.

form.formComment: Freshened for 44 days. Last run finished fourth of 7 runners at Doncaster on February 27 over 4900m, 57 len behind Swift Jet carrying 74kg at $17. The run before made some head-way from midfield; finished eighth of 13 runners at Doncaster on January 23 over 3900m, on slow going 62 len behind Rathkenny carrying 74.5kg at $41. Forward showing expected. Can sneak into the finish if puts best foot forward.

form.formComment: Impressive in recent runs. Last outing finished fourth of 10 runners at Taunton on March 24 over 4800m, 6 len behind Lady Caro with 73kg at $8. form.formComment: Useful gelding. Last outing finished second of 10 runners at Bangor-On-Dee on March 21 over 4600m, a neck behind Thereyare carrying 68.5kg at $4.30. Start before won by 3 len Ludlow on February 26 over 4200m defeating Ocean Walz carrying 68kg at $4.50 in a hurdle. Promising galloper. Shapes well here and a bold showing is expected.

form.formComment: Last run pulled up at Bangor-On-Dee on March 31 over 3900m. Before that pulled up at Doncaster on February 27 over 3900m. This appears outside her grasp. Hard to make a decent case.

form.formComment: Last outing finished third of 9 runners at Huntingdon on March 18 over 5000m, 21 len behind Another Day Out with 72.5kg at $4.50. form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up finished eighth of 12 runners at Hereford on January 12 over 3200m, on slow going 22 len behind Vol Royale carrying 71kg at $81. Second run from a spell finished third of 7 starters at Hereford on February 22 over 4300m, on slow going 14 len behind On The Go with 70kg at $5.50. Fitter now and making headway every start. Looks to be on the up and can take the next step.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Inconvenienced, rounding the bend turning into the home straight.

form.formComment: Last outing ran last in a small field at this track on March 16 over 4000m, on slow going 133 len behind Lon Chaney with 70kg at $151. The start before that; finished sixth of 9 starters at this track on March 1 over 4000m, on a wet track; 60 len behind Uptown Dandy with 73kg at $101. Definite winning chance. Hard to fault on his best jumps form.

form.formComment: Freshened for 49 days. Last start pulled up at Fontwell Park on February 22 over 4300m. Race to post a big 5 len win. Lingfield on February 5 over 4600m in the wet defeating Welcheston Warrier carrying 65kg at $4 in a hurdle. Worth forgiving that run and cannot be discounted lightly.
